title: Mini Vanilla
description: A modpack that tries not to get out of the vanilla Minecraft style
body:
A modpack that tries not to get out of the vanilla Minecraft style

# Features

- Ambient Sounds
- New Bosses
- New villages
- More structures including dungeons
- Support for shaders
- Some new effects

# Extras

- Shader used in photos: [Complementary Shaders](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/customization/complementary-shaders)
